# self-update: hermetic cases only (the test binary reports version "dev", so a
# plain self-update short-circuits before any network call; --check-only/--force
# would reach GitHub and are covered by unit tests + the manual smoke, not here).
# The harness runs mtt via `exec` (testscript.Main; no bare `mtt` command).

# usage: unexpected arg -> error
! exec mtt self-update bogus
! stderr 'panic'

# dev build, no --force -> refuse before any network (hermetic), exit 1
! exec mtt self-update
stderr 'cannot determine the current version'

# same, --json: the object is emitted with error set, exit 1
! exec mtt self-update --json
stdout '"error"'
stdout '"current": "dev"'
